title: VPB: Too Many Guns
description: KubeJS script datapack to disable all the base Vic's Point Blank Weapons, Ammo, and Attachments.
body:
# **No longer needed as of Point Blank 1.7.6**
Default guns can now be disabled in point blanks config file.

Removes the crafting recipes for all the base mod guns, ammo, and attachments, but does not remove them from the creative inventory.



This project is not affiliated with, sponsored by, or endorsed by the Vic's Point Blank mod team.

**Note: current version removes _all_ arms dealer trades.**
